code:
import io
import string
import list

let text = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
mut seen: List<Int> = []
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(tok)
    mut h = 0
    mut j = 0
    while j < string.len(tok)
      match string.byte_at(tok, j)
      when Some(b)
        h = h * 131 + b
      when None
        h = h
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    if list.contains(seen, h)
      count = count
    else
      seen = list.push(seen, h)
      count = count + 1
    end
  when None
    count = count
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("unique=#{count}")
